info.title: Sara Documentation
info.description: This is the OpenAPI specification for sara.

get.description: Handles NextAuth GET requests for session and provider auth routes.

post.description: Handles NextAuth POST requests for callbacks, sign-in, and sign-out routes.

get.description: Starts Facebook OAuth by returning or redirecting to the Facebook authorization URL.

post.description: Starts Facebook OAuth by returning or redirecting to the Facebook authorization URL.

get.description: Starts Google OAuth by returning or redirecting to the Google authorization URL.

post.description: Starts Google OAuth by returning or redirecting to the Google authorization URL.

get.description: Starts Instagram OAuth by returning or redirecting to the Instagram authorization URL.

post.description: Starts Instagram OAuth by returning or redirecting to the Instagram authorization URL.
Deletes the current cookie-backed session and redirects the user to the home page.

get.description: Handles the Facebook OAuth callback, creates a user session, and returns or redirects with the session token.

post.description: Handles the Facebook OAuth callback from a JSON payload, creates a user session, and returns or redirects with the session token.

get.description: Handles the Google OAuth callback, creates a user session, and returns or redirects with the session token.

post.description: Handles the Google OAuth callback from a JSON payload, creates a user session, and returns or redirects with the session token.

get.description: Handles the Instagram OAuth callback, creates a user session, and returns or redirects with the session token.

post.description: Handles the Instagram OAuth callback from a JSON payload, creates a user session, and returns or redirects with the session token.

get.description: Gets the business for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new business for the authenticated user.

put.description: Updates the existing business for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes the business for the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieves invoices for the authenticated user's business. Supports search, pagination, and filtering.

post.description: Creates a new invoice for a business, generates a PDF, and uploads it to Cloudinary.

get.description: Retrieves a single invoice by slug for the authenticated user's business.

put.description: Updates an existing invoice for the authenticated user's business.

delete.description: Deletes an existing invoice for the authenticated user's business.

get.description: Retrieves receipts for the authenticated user's business. Supports search, pagination, and filtering.

post.description: Creates a new receipt for a business.

get.description: Retrieves a single receipt by slug for the authenticated user's business.

put.description: Updates an existing receipt for the authenticated user's business.

delete.description: Deletes an existing receipt for the authenticated user's business.

get.description: Retrieves services for the authenticated user's business. Supports search, pagination, and filtering.

post.description: Creates a new service for the user's business.

get.description: Retrieves a single service by slug for the authenticated user's business.

put.description: Updates an existing service for the authenticated user's business.

delete.description: Deletes or deactivates an existing service for the authenticated user's business.
